titleStmt.title: SII 17.595: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 595. (A.R. No. 550 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājāsvāmin temple.
This inscription is dated in the reign of the Kulōttuṅga-chōḻadēva, who took Madurai and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya, i.e. Kulōttuṅga III.

It records the grant of lands by purchase as antarāyam koḷḷā ūrkkīḻ iṟaiyili by the Śrīkāryam Pūṅguḍaiyāṉ Vīra-Vichchādira(vidyādhara)—ppallavaraiyaṉ, from the villagers of Pudukkuḍi and Paṉaṅguḍi, for worship and daily food offerings to god Dikku-niṟainda Vināyaka-ppiḷḷaiyār set up to the west of tīrthakkuḷam by the donor. The lands along with another piece of land granted for the same purpose by the residents of Tyāgavinōda-chchaturvēdimaṅgalam, were entrusted to the care of Mahāvrati Bāradāyaṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ Tirumutti-yāvāṉ who had the parichārakkāṇi in the temple. The god Vīdiviḍaṅga-pperumāḷ is stated to have approved this arrangement made at the instance of Tiruvāykkēḻvi Tamiḻadaraiyaṉ, when he was taken out in procession in the āṭṭattu-veḷi on the occasion of the Pūśam festival in the month of Tai.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ . śrītirupuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyum koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 10 3vatu Uṭaiyār vitiviṭaṅkap peru māḷ taippūcat tirunāḷ Āṭṭattu veḷiyil tiru Ulāc ceytaruḷā niṟka śrīmāyecurar viṇṇappañ ceytapaṭi pūṅkuṭaiyāṉ vīraviccāttirappallavaraiyar tirttakkuḷattuk ku melkaraiyil Eḻuṉtaruḷuvitta tikkuniṟainta viṉāyakappiḷḷaiyārkku Aṟca ṉaikkum tiruamutupaṭikkum ṉāḷ
oṉṟukkuk kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻi Arici peṟaveṇumeṉṟu viṇṇappañ ceyyat tiruvāk keḻvi tamiḻatarayaṉ viṇṇappattāl cimāyecurak kaṇkāṇi māneṉtukaiyyaṉaiyum cikāriya viraviccātirap pallavaraiyaṉaiyum nivaṉtam niccayittu kuṭuṅkaḷeṉṟu tiruu ḷamāy Aruḷa pūṅkuṭaiyār viraviccātirappallavaraiyar tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka vilai koṇṭeṉ keyamāṇikka vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvārur kūṟṟattup piramatecam putukkuṭi Ūravar
pakkale nālumā nilamum Iṉnāṭṭu paṉaṅkuṭi Ūravar pakkale nālumānilamum Āka nilam Eṭṭumāvum Antarāyaṅ koḷḷā Ūrkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyāka vilai koṇṭe neṉṟum tiyākaviṉo(ta)taccaruppetimaṅkalattār Antarāyaṅ koḷḷā Ūrkiḻ Iṟaii(l)li yākap piḷḷaiyār cipātattile nirvāṟṟatu viṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭumā Āka nilam Araiyum Ikkoyil paricārakkāṇi Uṭaiya makāvirati pāratāyaṉ tiru
cciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ tirumuttiyāḻvāṉ peṟile Antarāyaṅ koḷḷāt taramili Ūr kiḻ Iṟaiyiliyākap piramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttārkaḷeṉṟu viṇṇappañ ceyya Ippaṭi Ivvūravar pakkale Ūrkiḻ Iṟaiyili peṟṟapaṭikkum Ippaṭi nivantamuṅ kaṭṭina paṭikkum nam piḷḷaikku Iraṇṭu tirupparicāram nāṭṭina per Iraṇṭukkum ṉāḷ Oṉ ṟukku coṟu kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyāka vaṉta coṟu niṟpatākavum nam piḷ
ḷai Iruppum cikāramum kuḻi Eḻupatilum Ikkoyil parikāri Ākkiṉa teṅku Uḷ ḷiṭṭa māvirukṣam tiruviḷakkukku Uṭalākak koṭuttom Ippaṭi kalveṭṭik kuṭukka veṉṟu cimāyecura kaṇkāṇi māneṉtukaiyyaṉaiyum cikāriyam viraviccātirap pallava raiyaṉaiyum tiruviḷamāy Aruḷinār; .
Digital edition of SII 17.595 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
